real_weddings.title: OCEAN VIEW & CHAPEL WEDDING OF BAYU AND JURELL AT HILTON BALI RESORT

about: Situated in the southern part of Bali, in the prestigious Nusa Dua area, Hilton Bali Resort offers a tranquil escape with easy access to bustling lifestyle centres. Create everlasting memories at the resort’s elegant cliff-top glass-chapel, Wiwaha, with stunning Indian Ocean views or opt for an intimate wedding ceremony in the resort’s secluded white sand beach, Serenity. Transform your vision of a grand matrimonial celebration into reality in the Graha Paruman Ballroom that offers floor-to-ceiling glass windows overlooking the Indian Ocean. Leave your wedding planning in the hands of our experienced wedding planners, and all you need to do is say “I do”.
